purpose: Test whether the reframe sticks. Move from animation to concrete visual. Confirm students can identify groups in a new (non-graph) context.
visual: Context Visualizations. 3 bags with 4 items in each. Plain visual, no animation.
guide: "Here's a different picture. No graph. Just bags."
on_correct: "3 bags. That's 3 groups of 4. Same idea—bags instead of graph symbols."
on_incorrect: "Count the bags. Each bag is a group."
design_note: No scaffolding ("How many in each?"). Student must transfer the two-step thinking independently. If they succeed, the reframe is working. If they struggle, Lesson Section 1 spends significant time on the two-step routine.
